# Cdp Stack

**Summary**: The process of summing multiple traces from the same CDP to improve signal-to-noise ratio.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024]] applied CDP stacking as a method for both standard processing and within the parallax-based approaches.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Stacking produced a clearer image, but noise from unmuted traces in standard processing degraded quality near the dune (Page 57). ([[2024-jahlan|Jahlan, 2024, p. 57]])
